question: How do you ask 'Where is the bathroom?' in Ukrainian?
incorrectAnswers: {{uk-UA|Що таке туалет?|Shcho take tualet?|SHCHO TA-ke tua-LET?}}
explanation: 'De' means 'where'. 'De tualet?' is the most practical travel phrase.

question: How do you ask 'How much does this cost?' in Ukrainian?
correctAnswer: {{uk-UA|Скільки це коштує?|Skilky tse koshtuye?|SKIL-ky TSE KOSH-tuye?}}
incorrectAnswers: {{uk-UA|Що це таке?|Shcho tse take?|SHCHO TSE TA-ke?}}
{{uk-UA|Де це купити?|De tse kupyty?|DE TSE ku-PY-ty?}}
{{uk-UA|Чи є знижка?|Chy ye znyzhka?|CHY YE ZNYZH-ka?}}
explanation: 'Skilky tse koshtuye?' — 'How much does this cost?' — essential for markets.

question: How do you order 'a coffee, please' in Ukrainian?
correctAnswer: {{uk-UA|Каву, будь ласка.|Kavu, bud laska.|KA-vu, BUD LAS-ka.}}
explanation: '[Item], bud laska' — '[Item], please' — the polite café order pattern.

question: How do you ask for the bill in Ukrainian?
correctAnswer: {{uk-UA|Рахунок, будь ласка.|Rakhunok, bud laska.|rak-HU-nok, BUD LAS-ka.}}
incorrectAnswers: {{uk-UA|Меню, будь ласка.|Menyu, bud laska.|ME-nyu, BUD LAS-ka.}}
{{uk-UA|Ще одну страву.|Shche odnu stravu.|SHCHE OD-nu STRA-vu.}}
{{uk-UA|Дякую за їжу.|Dyakuyu za yizhu.|DYA-kuyu ZA YIZ-hu.}}
explanation: 'Rakhunok' = the bill/check. Add 'bud laska' to make it polite.

question: How do you say 'I don't understand' in Ukrainian?
correctAnswer: {{uk-UA|Я не розумію.|Ya ne rozumiyu.|YA NE ro-ZU-miyu.}}
incorrectAnswers: {{uk-UA|Я не знаю.|Ya ne znayu.|YA NE ZNAYU.}}
{{uk-UA|Я не чую.|Ya ne chuyu.|YA NE CHUYU.}}
{{uk-UA|Я не говорю.|Ya ne hovoryu.|YA NE ho-VO-ryu.}}
explanation: 'Ya ne rozumiyu' — the essential phrase for when you've lost the thread.

question: How do you say 'Do you speak English?' in Ukrainian?
correctAnswer: {{uk-UA|Ви говорите англійською?|Vy hovoryte angliyiyskoyu?|VY ho-vo-RY-te an-GLIYIYS-koyu?}}
incorrectAnswers: {{uk-UA|Ви розумієте мене?|Vy rozumiyete mene?|VY ro-zu-MIYE-te ME-ne?}}
{{uk-UA|Ви знаєте англійську?|Vy znayete angliysku?|VY ZNAYE-te an-GLIYS-ku?}}
explanation: Polite plural form 'Vy hovoryte angliyiyskoyu?' — informal: 'Ty hovorysh angliyiyskoyu?'
